report_date_pretty.description: Human-readable report date used in the end-of-day recap heading.

spy_actual.description: SPY regular-session percentage change; render with the percent sign in the template.

qqq_actual.description: QQQ regular-session percentage change; render with the percent sign in the template.

vix_close.description: VIX closing value. Use a string only when the value is unavailable.

recap_rows.description: End-of-day reconciliation of premarket action directives against actual market results.

actual.description: What happened during the session, including concrete numbers.

result.description: Directive outcome: hit, partial, miss, or invalidated.

today_hit_rate.description: Today's directive hit rate as a percentage.

week_hit_rate.description: Current week's cumulative directive hit rate as a percentage.

week_correct.description: Number of correct directives during the current week.

week_total.description: Number of directives evaluated during the current week.

month_hit_rate.description: Rolling 30-day directive hit rate as a percentage.

month_correct.description: Number of correct directives in the rolling 30-day window.

month_total.description: Number of directives evaluated in the rolling 30-day window.

invalidation_count.description: Invalidation trigger count for the current week and rolling 30 days, e.g. '1 / 3'.

correct_judgment.description: Most important judgment that was correct today.

wrong_judgment.description: Most important judgment that was wrong today.

emerging_pattern.description: Repeated pattern emerging from recent recap results.

report_type.description: Report generator mode. Shared report rules apply to both values.

qqq_reengage_20ma.description: QQQ 20MA level. Every use must be labeled 20MA / 初步 re-engage and may restore standard tech allocation.

qqq_breakout_add_1sd.description: QQQ +1SD expansion boundary. Every use must be labeled +1SD / 突破加碼 and may add risk beyond standard allocation.

upgrade_trigger_rule.description: Visible threshold for the upgrade trigger box.

downgrade_trigger_rule.pattern: ^(?:任一觸發即成立|滿足 [1-3]/3 才成立)$
downgrade_trigger_rule.description: Visible threshold for the downgrade trigger box.

pre_market_movers.description: Structured premarket movers. Price is mandatory and is rendered immediately before premarket_change.

price.description: Verified current premarket price; do not estimate.

pre_market_movers_note.description: Optional note below the movers table; unavailable values must be stated explicitly.

upgrade_trigger_1.description: Regime upgrade trigger 1. Single sentence with explicit numeric threshold; no consider/watch verbs.

upgrade_trigger_2.description: Regime upgrade trigger 2. Single sentence with explicit numeric threshold; no consider/watch verbs.

upgrade_trigger_3.description: Regime upgrade trigger 3. Single sentence with explicit numeric threshold; no consider/watch verbs.

downgrade_trigger_1.description: Regime downgrade trigger 1. Single sentence with explicit numeric threshold; no consider/watch verbs.

downgrade_trigger_2.description: Regime downgrade trigger 2. Single sentence with explicit numeric threshold; no consider/watch verbs.

downgrade_trigger_3.description: Regime downgrade trigger 3. Single sentence with explicit numeric threshold; no consider/watch verbs.

intraday_playbook_rows.description: Intraday trigger playbook rows. Must include ORB up/down scenarios, macro or catalyst reaction, mid-day reversal, late-day Fed/VIX behavior, and MOC imbalance.

report_date_pretty.description: Human-readable report date used in the end-of-day recap heading.

spy_actual.description: SPY regular-session percentage change; render with the percent sign in the template.

qqq_actual.description: QQQ regular-session percentage change; render with the percent sign in the template.

vix_close.description: VIX closing value. Use a string only when the value is unavailable.

actual.description: What happened during the session, including concrete numbers.

result.description: Directive outcome: hit, partial, miss, or invalidated.

today_hit_rate.description: Today's directive hit rate as a percentage.

week_hit_rate.description: Current week's cumulative directive hit rate as a percentage.

week_correct.description: Number of correct directives during the current week.

week_total.description: Number of directives evaluated during the current week.

month_hit_rate.description: Rolling 30-day directive hit rate as a percentage.

month_correct.description: Number of correct directives in the rolling 30-day window.

month_total.description: Number of directives evaluated in the rolling 30-day window.

invalidation_count.description: Invalidation trigger count for the current week and rolling 30 days, e.g. '1 / 3'.

correct_judgment.description: Most important judgment that was correct today.

wrong_judgment.description: Most important judgment that was wrong today.

emerging_pattern.description: Repeated pattern emerging from recent recap results.

report_type.description: Report generator mode. Shared report rules apply to both values.

qqq_reengage_20ma.description: QQQ 20MA level. Every use must be labeled 20MA / 初步 re-engage and may restore standard tech allocation.

qqq_breakout_add_1sd.description: QQQ +1SD expansion boundary. Every use must be labeled +1SD / 突破加碼 and may add risk beyond standard allocation.

downgrade_trigger_rule.pattern: ^(?:任一觸發即成立|滿足 [1-3]/3 才成立)$
downgrade_trigger_rule.description: Visible threshold for the downgrade trigger box.

pre_market_movers.description: Structured premarket movers. Price is mandatory and is rendered immediately before premarket_change.

price.description: Verified current premarket price; do not estimate.

pre_market_movers_note.description: Optional note below the movers table; unavailable values must be stated explicitly.

action.description: Binary action. Render the first word in bold in HTML rows.

positioning_primary.description: Entry-point summary: overall position sizing or positioning bias for today.

positioning_secondary.description: Entry-point summary: hedge, balance, or portfolio offset instruction for today.

positioning_watch.description: Entry-point summary: the single most important market watch for today.

section_pre_market_movers_primary_action.description: Pre-market movers: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_pre_market_movers_condition_acti.description: Pre-market movers: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_pre_market_movers_avoid_action.description: Pre-market movers: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

section_correction_checklist_primary_act.description: General Market Correction Checklist: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_correction_checklist_condition_a.description: General Market Correction Checklist: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_correction_checklist_avoid_actio.description: General Market Correction Checklist: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

section_macro_premarket_background_prima.description: Macro events and premarket background: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_macro_premarket_background_condi.description: Macro events and premarket background: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_macro_premarket_background_avoid.description: Macro events and premarket background: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

section_sector_thematic_etf_primary_acti.description: Sector / Thematic ETF: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_sector_thematic_etf_condition_ac.description: Sector / Thematic ETF: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_sector_thematic_etf_avoid_action.description: Sector / Thematic ETF: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

section_major_etf_technical_primary_acti.description: Major ETF technicals: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_major_etf_technical_condition_ac.description: Major ETF technicals: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_major_etf_technical_avoid_action.description: Major ETF technicals: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

section_50ma_atr_extension_primary_actio.description: 50MA ATR extension: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_50ma_atr_extension_condition_act.description: 50MA ATR extension: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_50ma_atr_extension_avoid_action.description: 50MA ATR extension: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

section_market_breadth_primary_action.description: Market breadth: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_market_breadth_condition_action.description: Market breadth: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_market_breadth_avoid_action.description: Market breadth: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

section_fx_commodities_primary_action.description: FX and commodities: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_fx_commodities_condition_action.description: FX and commodities: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_fx_commodities_avoid_action.description: FX and commodities: negative instruction, what to avoid today.

positioning_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

premarket_movers_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

checklist_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

macro_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

sector_etf_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

major_etf_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

breadth_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

forex_commodity_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.

treasury_invalidation.description: Falsifier only. Format: 若 [trigger] → [original action] 失效, [replacement]. Must use a numeric threshold or binary event.
